---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for policast
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case? Link any related
issues or research docs under `research/`.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Affected component

- [ ] `policast-core`
- [ ] `policast-datafusion`
- [ ] `policast-uc`
- [ ] `policast-spark`
- [ ] Catalog integration (Polaris / Lakekeeper / Unity Catalog)
- [ ] Docs / examples / build / CI

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Additional context

Anything else — prior art, Cedar/CEL semantics, performance considerations, etc.
